MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Before the court is a Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Eugene Ryu, Yesi Lagunas and K&L Gates LLP, counsel of record for Defendant The Mosser Companies, Inc. The motion is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the motion is granted.

Prior to the time set for hearing, Moving Party must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org an updated proposed order on MC-053 with accurate information inserted, where appropriate. Note the Order will not be effective until Counsel files a Proof of Service of the executed order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
